title: BadutZY's Survival Modpack (Fabric)
description: modpack that add some stuff to minecraft
body:
![title of the modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ce783be28f7a2ae2075798caaed90733699d6cc.png)
----------

modpack that adds some things in minecraft to make minecraft more challenging, there are some new mobs, new Rebuilt structures, additional effects on water, additional furniture, and much more. you can see more in the gallery section.

![description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53d077b67d42124af110e606131542cd2c208082.png)

You can also add other mods you want, below here are some mods that are not exist in modrinth which these mods are part of my modpack.

- [Vanilla Tweaks (3D)](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#XOMXX1)
- [Grim Statues](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/grim-statues/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&version=1.20.1&gameVersionTypeId=4)
- [MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod: Refurbished](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&version=1.20.1&gameVersionTypeId=4)
- [Framework (for the furniture mod)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&version=1.20.1&gameVersionTypeId=4)
- [Sleeping Overhaul 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sleepingoverhaul2/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&version=1.20.1&gameVersionTypeId=4)
